subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath ordained for His chosen servants every tribulation, and this hath ever been His way with them that are brought nigh unto Him. Say: In the descent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی قدر لعباده الاصفیا کل البلایا و هذه من سنته علی المقربین قل ان فی نزول
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
